title: UK-Republic of Korea Digital Partnership 2025
body: "This joint statement is a collaboration between the Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT), and the Ministry of Science and ICT of the Republic of Korea (MSIT).  The statement:   reaffirms the shared commitment to collaboration through the UK-ROK Digital Partnership (2023), delivering growth, and strengthening resilience and security highlights cooperation and outcomes over the last 12 months under all 4 pillars of the Partnership outlines priorities for 2026   Sectors include telecommunications, semiconductors, AI, digital standards and cybersecurity.  "
